data.title: First Mold's US mold exports surged by 30% in 2025 with over 650 units shipped, driven by demand in electronics, automotive, and medical sectors.
data.description: In Zhongshan, China, First Mold revealed a rise in its market presence on January 28, 2026. Their report highlighted that in 2025 alone, they sent more than 650 mold units to the US, marking a significant 30% surge in exports. This development underscores First Mold's growing influence and success in the industry.

data.title: Orvana starts deep drilling at Taguas, Argentina after geophysical survey reports. TSX:ORV. Jan 28, 2026. (char: 88)
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Orvana Minerals Corp. (TSX: ORV) shared positive results from the Induced Polarization ("IP") and Magnetotelluric ("MT") geophysical survey conducted at their Taguas project in San Juan. The survey revealed encouraging data, indicating significant potential at the site. This marks a promising development for Orvana as they continue to explore and expand their operations. The company's stock symbol is TSX: ORV.

data.title: U.S. chip policy on China is criticized by Beijing Review as flawed and unstable. On Jan. 13, U.S. allowed AI chip export.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, the U.S. Government approved the export of chips to China, signaling a shift in their previous stance. This decision comes after a period of uncertainty surrounding the export regulations. Despite this approval, caution is advised for U.S. companies, as the situation remains complex and subject to change. This development marks a significant change in the chip export policy.

data.title: BTC price dips below $90,000 ahead of FOMC as investors anticipate Jerome Powell’s speech for potential impact on key levels.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin dropped below $90,000 amidst anticipation of Jerome Powell's speech following the FOMC meeting. Investors are preparing for potential significant fluctuations in Bitcoin's price around crucial levels.

data.title: Board members of KPN bought more shares to boost their stake in the company.
data.description: Today, executives on the Board of Management have acquired shares in KPN in order to bolster their ownership stake in the company.

data.title: A47 secures $2M funding for AI-native news platform in Dubai to verify, personalize, and adapt news for user preferences.
data.description: A news organization in Dubai, UAE, called A47, has secured $2 million in pre-seed funding as of January 28, 2026. The funding will be used to expedite the progress of an artificial intelligence-driven news platform. This platform is equipped with sophisticated technology to authenticate, tailor, and adjust news content based on individual user preferences.

data.title: Wallet connected to suspected US seizure theft creates meme coin, crashes 97% on Pump.fun, sparking concerns with tokenomics.
data.description: A wallet connected to an alleged theft involving crypto seized by the US government recently introduced a Solana memecoin on Pump.fun. However, this memecoin quickly plummeted by 97%, prompting concerns about its tokenomics.

data.title: Stock futures rise as investors await Fed decision with 97.2% likelihood of unchanged interest rates. Dow up 0.04%, Nasdaq 0.74%. Starbucks and Microsoft earnings in focus.
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up following a mixed close, with major benchmark indices on the rise. Markets are anticipating a tense press conference from Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell amid subpoenas and presidential pressure overshadowing the proceedings. The FedWatch tool shows a 97.2% likelihood of interest rates remaining unchanged in January. The 10-year Treasury bond yield is at 4.24%, and the two-year bond yield is at 3.57%. Index performance shows Dow Jones +0.04%, S&P 500 +0.30%, Nasdaq 100 +0.74%, Russell 2000 +0.40%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF are higher in premarket. Starbucks Corp. (SBUX) is 0.76% lower with earnings projections of 59 cents/share on $9.73 billion revenue, while Microsoft Corp. (MSFT) rose slightly ahead of earnings release with expectations of $3.97/share on $80.27 billion revenue. Benzinga's Edge Stock Rankings note strong price trends for SBUX and weak trends for MSFT.

data.title: New CFO appointed by On; 2 years experience; annual revenue $5 million.
data.description: According to recently released statistics, the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 8.2%, marking an increase of 1.5% from the previous quarter. The number of jobless individuals now stands at 4.3 million, reflecting a notable surge of 800,000 people. These figures highlight the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market amidst the current economic conditions. Additionally, the data reveals a concerning trend of job losses across various sectors, with the service industry being particularly hard-hit. Experts suggest that immediate measures need to be implemented to address this growing issue and support those affected by unemployment.

data.title: Dunkin'® launches Valentine's Day lineup with Brownie Batter donut, new drinks, and MUNCHKINS® Tin.
data.description: In Boston, Dunkin’ is spreading the love this Valentine’s Day with a menu tailored for sweethearts. The beloved Brownie Batter donut is making a comeback, alongside a selection of new flirtatious beverages. Additionally, limited-edition Valentine’s Day MUNCHKINS® Tins will be available. The seasonal lineup includes exclusive offerings for a limited time. Customers can indulge in these treats and elevate their Valentine's Day experience with Dunkin’s diverse selection of delightful goodies.

data.title: Critical federal meeting amid Trump administration's assaults on Federal Reserve. Criminal probe targets chair Jerome H. Powell.
data.description: The current administration has launched numerous criticisms against the Federal Reserve, with an intense focus on its chair, Jerome H. Powell, even going as far as initiating a criminal investigation.

data.title: Federal Reserve to maintain interest rates in upcoming meeting. Big question remains on length of pause after series of cuts in second half of 2025.
data.description: It is anticipated that the central bank will maintain the current interest rates during their meeting on Wednesday. This decision comes after a sequence of rate cuts in the latter part of 2025. The key focus now is on how extensive this pause in rate adjustments will be and for how long it will remain in effect.

data.title: Sundance Film Festival relocates from Park City, Utah. Ethan Hawke cites festival as launching pad in '90s.
data.description: Ethan Hawke expressed a sense of unease, stating that it is difficult to ignore the disruption happening. He mentioned that his acting career gained momentum after his initial films were showcased at the Utah festival during the 1990s.

data.title: Record-breaking $500B municipal debt issuance fuels public projects, tax breaks for investors amid booming market.
data.description: Last year, the issuance of municipal debt exceeded $500 billion, setting a new record. This significant amount of debt has attracted interest from a wide range of investors.
